label: plain_text
text:
Shabnam: There is a condition. The fractional 1
unit used for the two
fractions have to be the same! Like
2-6
and
3-6
both use
the
same fractional unit
1-6
(i.e., the denominators are t
the same).
But
6-8
and
21
do not use the same fractional units (they have
30
different denominators).
